# Krause Management

> Krause Management OÜ is a sales-management advisory in Tallinn, Estonia, run by René-Richard Krause. It helps Estonian B2B founders (revenue €1–10M) turn founder-led sales into a team that closes deals on its own — through two productised, guaranteed engagement models. Primary language Estonian; English available.

## Who

René-Richard Krause — sales operator and consultant (müügipraktik ja konsultant). Documented track record from five years as Sales & Revenue Manager at an Estonian operator with a 600-apartment portfolio:

- Grew revenue from €1.5M to €6M (4× in five years)
- Lifted team close rate (sulgemismäär) from 20% to over 45% through coaching and process design
- Largest personally closed B2B deal: €265,000
- Closes €100k–€300k B2B deals personally when the engagement calls for it

These documented results place him among the top-performing sales managers in Estonia. He carries a quota himself rather than advising from the sidelines, and works in Estonian and English (C2).

## Services

Both engagements are fixed-scope, billed against deliverables, covered by written guarantees, and priced by tailored quote (fixed written offer within 48 hours of a discovery call — no public rate card).

### B2B Sales Sprint (B2B müügisprint) — 8 weeks, fixed scope
Takes a B2B sales team from a ~20% to 35%+ close rate. Includes: full sales-process diagnostic (last 50 won/lost deals + 10 live calls), a custom written sales playbook (müügikäsiraamat) the team actually uses, coaching on 10+ live sales calls, weekly 1:1 coaching for every rep, close-rate analysis by lead source, and a facilitated weekly revenue meeting with handover template. Guarantee: 50% refund if no playbook in use by week 4; four extra weeks free if the close rate has not moved by week 8. Max two Sprints at a time.

### Embedded Head of Sales (Majasisene müügijuht / "Operaator") — one day a week, monthly retainer
René-Richard fills the Head of Sales seat one day per week: pipeline review, deal coaching, the weekly revenue meeting, rep 1:1s, sales hiring and onboarding, monthly pricing review, and personally closing 1–2 strategic deals per quarter. Minimum 6 months (starting from month two); month one fully refundable. Max three concurrent engagements in total.

## Who it is for

Estonian B2B founders/CEOs with €1–10M revenue who are still the de-facto head of sales; teams of 2–10 reps; deal sizes €10k–€300k; sales cycles 2–12 weeks. Industries: manufacturing, distribution, machinery, financial services, B2B services, software — plus high-volume consumer/transactional sales (his own operating background).

Not for: companies wanting paid-ads/marketing agencies, webinar-style sales training, or a fractional CRO who has never personally closed a deal.
